importlib.util/ModuleSpec/origin.name: origin
importlib.util/ModuleSpec/origin.description: The location the loader should use to load the module (see module.__file__). For example, for modules loaded from a .py file this is the filename. The finder should always set this attribute to a meaningful value for the loader to use. In the uncommon case that there is not one (like for namespace packages), it should be set to None.

importlib.util/machinery/OPTIMIZED_BYTEC.name: OPTIMIZED_BYTECODE_SUFFIXES
importlib.util/machinery/OPTIMIZED_BYTEC.description: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.

info.excerpt: A list of strings representing the file suffixes for optimized bytecode modules. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.5: Use BYTECODE_SUFFIXES instead.
